name: вҳ… SLEEPOVER WITH 25-JI, NIGHTCORD DE?! вҳ…
description:
Just a heads up, if it talks for you, it's JanitorLLM itself and not what I programmed. (if that's what you're using to interact with my bots)

And this bot in particular may also work best with other proxies such as deepseek, I don't really know since I only use JanitorLLM.

КҷКҖЙӘЙҙЙў бҙҸбҙңбҙӣ КҸбҙҸбҙңКҖ бҙҳбҙҸбҙҳбҙ„бҙҸКҖЙҙ; кңұбҙӢбҙҮбҙӣбҙ„КңКҷбҙҸбҙҸбҙӢкңұ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙҚбҙҖбҙӢбҙҮбҙңбҙҳ КҷбҙҮбҙ„бҙҖбҙңкңұбҙҮ ЙӘбҙӣ'кңұ бҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ бҙӣбҙҸ КҖбҙҮкңұбҙӣ бҙңбҙҳ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… КңбҙҖбҙ бҙҮ бҙҖ кңұКҹбҙҮбҙҮбҙҳбҙҸбҙ бҙҮКҖ!
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁвҠ№вӮҠвҹЎвӢҶа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

art is by @nii5os on twoucan / twitter or x (will take down if they don't want their art to be reposted)

so this was suggested to me by @MonoO in the comments of my sleepover with kanade yoisaki and mafuyu asahina bot (which I appreciate sm!!)
so here we are, me following through that request because I need ideas badly :3

speaking of requests, so I open up a request forum or nah? I've honestly been putting that off for a while just because I don't know if I'd be able to follow through the requests people would give me without dipping out due to burnout.. So I would love to hear your opinion on it in the comments.

and I'd like to say, thank you all SO MUCH for blowing up my sleepover with 25-ji, Nightcord de. bots :D I'd honestly never thought it would get to the first page (specifically talking about my sleepover with mizuki akiyama and ena shinonome one)

so with both this suggestion and almost reaching 50 followers, might as well go through this one :D so enjoy it.

update: holy crap!? 50 followers?! tysmmm!! :D
